overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in tactical gear walking across a desolate snow-covered wasteland toward a massive wrecked structure. The scene features dramatic overcast lighting and post-apocalyptic atmosphere with scattered debris and ruined vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow wasteland with distant wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snow-covered wasteland toward the distant wrecked structure

entered.detail: large rusted red wreckage of a ship or aircraft lying on its side in the distance
dark rocky outcrops and cliffs on the horizon
flat white snow or ash-covered terrain with scattered footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a vast open snow-covered wasteland under an overcast sky. In the distance, a massive rusted wreckage structure lies on the left while rocky formations rise on the right horizon.

events.description: approaching the large wrecked ship structure, details of rusted metal and debris becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the wreckage as it grows larger in the frame, navigating around scattered debris

entered.detail: small rocks, metal fragments and wreckage scattered on the snow
rusted car frames and vehicle wreckage near the main structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive wrecked structure as it dominates the left side of the frame. Rusted vehicle frames and scattered debris become visible on the snow-covered ground as the details of the ship's torn metal hull come into view.

events.description: entering under the wrecked ship structure, passing beneath twisted metal beams and framework

agents.ego_description: walking under the wrecked structure through debris and ruined vehicles, entering the sheltered interior

entered.detail: twisted rusted support beams and framework of the wrecked structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters beneath the wrecked ship structure, passing through a cathedral-like space of twisted rusted metal beams. The sky becomes partially obscured by the wreckage overhead as the character navigates through the debris field among ruined vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate, snow-covered wasteland that culminates in the character entering the cavernous interior of a massive wreck. It begins with a wide view of the open tundra under an overcast sky, with rocky formations on the right and a distant rusted structure on the left. As the character advances, the wreckage grows to dominate the frame, revealing scattered debris and rusted vehicle frames emerging from the white snow. The scene then shifts as the camera moves closer to the torn metal hull, eventually passing beneath the structure into a cathedral-like space of twisted beams. Finally, the open sky becomes partially obscured by the overhead wreckage as the character navigates deeper into the field of ruined vehicles.
